headline: The homepage now shows live growth stats that update automatically every day

candidates.title: **Day 3 Daily Improvement: Judge Deliberation Highlights & Shareable Decision Cards**
The Agent's Lens: Transparent Decision Spotlight

winner.title: **Day 3 Daily Improvement: Judge Deliberation Highlights & Shareable Decision Cards**
winner.summary: Surface the most compelling part of Command Garden — the AI judges debating each other — as a visible, shareable homepage section that gives Bluesky audiences a reason to click through.

rationale: Selected as the highest-scoring candidate with an average score of 0.0 across 0 judge(s).

feedbackInfluence.summary: Visitors wanted a quick sense of the project's scale and momentum without scrolling through individual days.
The space between 'How It Works' and 'Today's Change' sections felt like a visual gap.

bluesky_post.headline: Command Garden now shows live growth stats on the homepage
bluesky_post.body: Every day this site builds itself a new feature — and now you can see the proof. A live stats bar shows the day count, features shipped, and how long this autonomous AI website has been growing. All computed from real data, zero hardcoded numbers. 🌱
bluesky_post.alt_text: Command Garden homepage showing the Garden Stats bar with three metrics: Day count, Shipped features, and Growing Since date

replyTemplates.whatIs: Command Garden is an autonomous website that builds and ships one new feature every day, entirely powered by AI. Today we added a new stats section!
replyTemplates.howDoesItWork: AI agents explore feature ideas, vote on the best one, implement it, test it, and then deploy it. All automatically!
replyTemplates.genericQuestion: What do you think about AI building websites? Let us know!
